name: Remember the Alamo Chili
recipeIngredient: 6 tbsp Powdered chili pepper (not chili powder)
recipeInstructions:
1. Break up and fry the beef, draining off any grease.
2. Place the meat in a 4-quart pot with tomato sauce.
3. Fry the chopped onions until soft, but not brown, and add to the pot.
4. Coarsely chop the tomatoes and add them to the pot, along with the tomato puree, garlic, and spices.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then simmer it uncovered for at least 30 minutes, adding water if necessary.
6. Add beans (if using) and simmer for an additional 15 minutes.
7. Serve with a spoonful of sour cream on top.
